
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Adaeze Ekwochi | Product Consultant & Business Growth Strategist</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600;1,700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --red: #c41e1e;
  --red-dark: #a01515;
  --black: #080808;
  --dark: #111111;
  --dark2: #1a1a1a;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --grey: #888888;
  --light: #f5f3ef;
  --light2: #eeeae3;
}

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* SCROLLBAR */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--black); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--red); border-radius: 2px; }

/* NAV */
nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  padding: 22px 60px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  background: rgba(8,8,8,0.85);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}

.nav-logo {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.nav-logo span { color: var(--red); }

.nav-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 40px;
  list-style: none;
}

.nav-links a {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: color 0.3s;
}

.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }

.nav-cta {
  background: var(--red);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 10px 24px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  transition: background 0.3s;
}

.nav-cta:hover { background: var(--red-dark); }

/* HERO */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding-top: 80px;
}

.hero-left {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 80px 60px 80px 60px;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.hero-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.2s forwards;
}

.hero-tag-dot {
  width: 8px; height: 8px;
  background: var(--red);
  border-radius: 50%;
}

.hero-tag span {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  color: var(--red);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.hero-headline {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 72px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.0;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.4s forwards;
}

.hero-headline em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--red);
}

.hero-sub {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 44px;
  max-width: 440px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.6s forwards;
}

.hero-buttons {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.8s forwards;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--red);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 16px 32px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  transition: all 0.3s;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(196,30,30,0.35);
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--red-dark);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(196,30,30,0.5);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 16px 32px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  transition: all 0.3s;
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}

/* Stats row */
.hero-stats {
  display: flex;
  gap: 40px;
  margin-top: 60px;
  padding-top: 40px;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 1s forwards;
}

.stat-item .stat-num {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 36px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  line-height: 1;
}

.stat-item .stat-num span { color: var(--red); }

.stat-item .stat-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--grey);
  margin-top: 4px;
  font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

/* Hero right - photo */
.hero-right {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.hero-photo {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center top;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease 0.3s forwards;
}

.hero-photo-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--black) 0%, transparent 30%),
              linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 60%, var(--black) 100%);
}

.hero-photo-accent {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 40px;
  right: 40px;
  background: var(--red);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 16px 20px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.4;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(196,30,30,0.4);
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 1.2s forwards;
}

.hero-photo-accent .accent-num {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 700;
  display: block;
}

/* ABOUT */
.about {
  background: var(--light);
  color: var(--black);
  padding: 120px 60px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 80px;
  align-items: center;
}

.section-tag {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.section-tag-line {
  width: 32px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--red);
}

.section-tag span {
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  color: var(--red);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.about-headline {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 54px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.05;
  color: var(--black);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.about-headline em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--red);
}

.about-body {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: #444;
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}

.about-right {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 24px;
}

.about-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 24px 28px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
}

.about-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.about-card-icon {
  width: 44px; height: 44px;
  background: rgba(196,30,30,0.1);
  border-radius: 12px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  font-size: 20px;
}

.about-card h4 {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--black);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.about-card p {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #666;
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-weight: 300;
}

/* SERVICES */
.services {
  background: var(--dark);
  padding: 120px 60px;
}

.services-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 70px;
}

.services-header .section-tag {
  justify-content: center;
}

.services-headline {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 54px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.services-headline em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--red);
}

.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}

.service-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 36px 32px;
  transition: all 0.3s;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.service-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--red);
  transform: scaleX(0);
  transition: transform 0.3s;
}

.service-card:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border-color: rgba(196,30,30,0.3);
  transform: translateY(-6px);
}

.service-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

.service-icon {
  width: 52px; height: 52px;
  background: rgba(196,30,30,0.12);
  border-radius: 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.service-card h3 {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.service-card .for-tag {
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  color: var(--red);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.service-card p {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  line-height: 1.7;
  font-weight: 300;
}

/* MARQUEE BAND */
.marquee-band {
  background: var(--red);
  padding: 18px 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.marquee-track {
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 0;
  animation: marquee 20s linear infinite;
}

.marquee-item {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  padding: 0 32px;
}

.marquee-dot {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
}

/* IMPACT SECTION */
.impact {
  background: var(--black);
  padding: 120px 60px;
  text-align: center;
}

.impact-headline {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 54px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.impact-headline em { color: var(--red); font-style: italic; }

.impact-sub {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: var(--grey);
  font-weight: 300;
  margin-bottom: 70px;
  max-width: 500px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.impact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 2px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border-radius: 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 80px;
}

.impact-item {
  background: var(--dark2);
  padding: 44px 20px;
  text-align: center;
}

.impact-num {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 52px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  line-height: 1;
}

.impact-num span { color: var(--red); }

.impact-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--grey);
  margin-top: 10px;
  font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* RED BAND */
.red-band {
  background: var(--red);
  padding: 80px 60px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  gap: 60px;
  align-items: center;
}

.red-band-headline {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 52px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.red-band-sub {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  font-weight: 300;
  margin-top: 12px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.btn-white {
  background: var(--white);
  color: var(--red);
  padding: 18px 36px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: all 0.3s;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}

.btn-white:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

/* CONTACT */
.contact {
  background: var(--dark);
  padding: 120px 60px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 80px;
  align-items: start;
}

.contact-headline {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 54px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.contact-headline em { color: var(--red); font-style: italic; }

.contact-body {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: var(--grey);
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
}

.contact-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 14px;
}

.contact-link {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.3s;
}

.contact-link:hover { color: var(--white); }

.contact-link-icon {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  background: rgba(196,30,30,0.12);
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.contact-form {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

.form-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.form-group label {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.form-group input,
.form-group textarea,
.form-group select {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--white);
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 300;
  transition: border-color 0.3s;
  outline: none;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}

.form-group input:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus,
.form-group select:focus {
  border-color: var(--red);
}

.form-group select option {
  background: var(--dark2);
}

.form-group textarea {
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: 120px;
}

.form-submit {
  background: var(--red);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 16px 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  transition: all 0.3s;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(196,30,30,0.3);
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.form-submit:hover {
  background: var(--red-dark);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

/* FOOTER */
footer {
  background: var(--black);
  padding: 40px 60px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.footer-logo {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
}

.footer-logo span { color: var(--red); }

.footer-copy {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--grey);
  font-weight: 300;
}

.footer-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 24px;
}

.footer-links a {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--grey);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.3s;
}

.footer-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { opacity: 0; }
  to { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes marquee {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* Scroll reveal */
.reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(30px);
  transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
}

.reveal.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Adaeze<span>.</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#impact">Impact</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Book a Free Call</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-tag">
      <div class="hero-tag-dot"></div>
      <span>Product Consultant & Growth Strategist</span>
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-headline">
      I Grew From<br>Nothing. Now I<br>Help Others<br>Build <em>Everything.</em>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Product consulting, business growth strategy, and career development for startups, organizations, and ambitious professionals across Africa and beyond.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Book a Free Call &rarr;</a>
      <a href="#services" class="btn-secondary">See How I Work &nearr;</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">5<span>+</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years Building Products</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">$600<span>K+</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Transactions Processed</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">3<span></span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Continents Served</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="hero-photo"></div>
    <div class="hero-photo-overlay"></div>
    <div class="hero-photo-accent">
      <span class="accent-num">27K+</span>
      Users Acquired
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-band">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span class="marquee-item">Product Strategy</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Business Growth</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Women's Economic Inclusion</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Career Mentorship</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Fintech & Payments</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">African Markets</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Product Strategy</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Business Growth</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Women's Economic Inclusion</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Career Mentorship</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Fintech & Payments</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">African Markets</span>
    <span class="marquee-item marquee-dot">✦</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-left reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">
      <div class="section-tag-line"></div>
      <span>About Me</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="about-headline">Built From Scratch.<br><em>Focused on</em><br>What Works.</h2>
    <p class="about-body">
      I've been broke, stuck, and underestimated. I also built products processing millions across Africa and Europe. I know both sides and that's what I bring to every client.<br><br>
      I work with startups, NGOs, multinationals, and ambitious professionals who are ready to stop guessing and start building things that actually work.
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="about-right reveal">
    <div class="about-card">
      <div class="about-card-icon">💡</div>
      <div>

<script>
  // Scroll reveal
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
